qa_pair.question: Look at every memo in the instance and add up all the emoji reactions across them. What is the total number of reactions?
Considering only the memos that are NOT pinned, one of them has more reactions than any other. That memo is about a book the author started reading. What is the title of that book?
Two memos are pinned. One contains external hyperlinks and the other does not. Give the single tag of the pinned memo that contains hyperlinks.
How many memos contain at least one fenced code block?
How many distinct users have authored the memos in this instance?
Find the memo that is a cheat sheet of git commands. How many comments does it have?
Find the memo containing a movie watchlist. What is the username of the user who created it?
Exactly one memo is a travel bucket list. It names a Nordic country the author plans to visit in winter to see the Northern Lights. Which country?
Using the authenticated session, what is the username (login name) of the account these memos belong to?
